lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Type-11 Prospector ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Type-11 Prospector
sources.what: Ship-specific stats, mining-restricted hardpoints, and shipyard pricing.

sources.label: Fandom — Type-11 Prospector
sources.what: Lakon Spaceways lore, dedicated-mining role, and the ship's spec reference.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Ship test pitting the Type-11 Prospector's mining hardpoints, Mk II modules and cargo against the Python, Krait Mk II and Type-8.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Deep dive on the Type-11 Prospector, covering hardpoint layout, mining tools and mining performance.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Follow-up on the Type-11 Prospector after its balance update, assessing post-fix mining performance.
